channel.title: Data-Pipelines on Systology
channel.description: Recent content in Data-Pipelines on Systology

item.title: Model Serving & Inference
item.description: Principles for highly available production ML inference; utilizing immutable model registries, dynamic request micro-batching, safe canary rollouts, graceful fallback degradation, and efficient GPU memory management.

item.title: Video Transcoding & Streaming Pipeline
item.description: An inherently scalable video ingestion and transcoding system architecture; asynchronously chunking heavy media, extracting actionable features, and steadily outputting adaptive bitrates via worker pools.

item.title: Intervals & Constraints
item.description: A framework for balancing Latency (system Completeness) against Verification (data Integrity) by effectively choosing between Speculative execution and Pessimistic consensus intervals.

item.title: Privacy-Preserving Federated Learning Platform
item.description: A secure platform design for advanced federated learning pipelines; training models directly across edge devices without sharing raw telemetry, utilizing secure local aggregation and robust privacy safeguards.

item.title: Real-Time Analytics Pipeline
item.description: A highly scalable real-time streaming pipeline engineered to continuously ingest and process high-volume user event streams; gracefully handling late arrivals and robust fault tolerance protocols.

item.title: Data Pipelines
item.description: Architectural principles for reliable batch and streaming data pipelines; focusing on strict time semantics, exactly-once processing, optimal partitioning, observability, and reproducible states.

item.title: Data Processing Architectures
item.description: A deep architectural comparison of data processing pipelines: evaluating Apache Spark’s batch ETL model against Apache Beam’s portable unified model and Apache Flink’s native API for stateful processing.

item.title: Monitoring & Observability
item.description: Best practices for establishing robust observability using RED/USE metrics, contextual structured logging, distributed tracing, actionable alerting, and SLO-driven reliability engineering.

item.title: Retrieval & RAG
item.description: Operational principles for robust search retrieval and RAG pipelines; focusing on hybrid lexical-semantic retrieval techniques, long-term embedding model stability, automated ranking evaluation, and privacy-aware indexing.

item.title: Web App
item.description: Guiding principles for production-ready web apps using 12-factor methodologies; encompassing stateless scaling, durable media handling, robust background processing, CI/CD, and deep observability.
